name: MongoDB Context Engine
description: Persists OpenClaw sessions to MongoDB with full context lifecycle — ingest, assemble, compact, and maintain.
author: OpenClaw Community

collection.description: MongoDB collection name for session documents

ownsCompaction.description: When true, the engine manages its own compaction algorithm in MongoDB instead of delegating to the runtime's file-based compaction.

cacheSize.description: Maximum number of sessions to cache in memory. Higher = faster but more RAM usage.

maintainEveryNTurns.description: Only sync to MongoDB every N turns. Higher = less frequent writes but more data loss risk on crash.
